title: Note App
description: This is a Note App made with MERN stack. This web app helps you to write your thoughts and save them in a secured place.

title: Admin Dashboard
description: Static Admin dashboard made with reactjs. Technologies like ReactTable, Chartjs are used in this app

title: Connect Plus - social media app
description: ConnectPlus is a cutting-edge social media platform built using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js), offering a seamless and engaging user experience. Designed with security as a top priority, ConnectPlus ensures your personal data and interactions are safeguarded through robust encryption and advanced security protocols.

title: Animated Web Page
description: Interactive UI made with core html, css and js which can be used in marketing of a product or Landing page for any organization.
